homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track captures the atmospheric sounds of Nangan Township, Taiwan, featuring field recordings of ocean waves mixed with subtle electric box noise. Recorded binaurally for an immersive headphone experience, the piece evokes a calm and meditative mood ideal for documentaries or travel vlogs about coastal landscapes.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This classical orchestral piece features a slow, flowing rhythm driven by the interplay of violin and cello. A melancholic melody carried by these strings builds a sense of drama and tension within an otherwise somber mood. The composition evokes deep introspection, making it well-suited for a historical drama or a moment of reflection.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This comedic instrumental duet features a male lead singing the main melody while a female voice provides humorous backing vocals. The fast-paced rhythm is driven by a lively banjo and a strong bass line, creating a funny atmosphere perfect for a comedy skit. With its playful energy and clear holiday theme, the piece serves as an entertaining soundtrack suitable for a festive performance.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a strong electronic and synth-driven sound that establishes a dynamic, energetic atmosphere. Powered by synthesizers and pulsating basslines, the piece creates an ideal soundtrack for futuristic themes or game environments. The driving electronic beat sustains a consistent rhythm throughout the composition, emphasizing its modern and immersive quality.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track delivers an energetic house beat driven by a strong bassline and electronic drumming. The fast-paced rhythm creates an upbeat atmosphere ideal for a nightclub or rave setting, featuring prominent synth melodies and computer-generated sounds.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental percussion track features a groovy rhythm driven by congas, bongos, and cajas chinas. The music relies on complex polyrhythms and syncopated patterns to create an energetic and engaging backdrop suitable for dance classes.

questions.name: Sample 8
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features a female vocalist singing in a melodious style, accompanied by the harmonium and tabla to create a romantic atmosphere. Bird sounds can be heard in the background, suggesting this piece is suitable for an Indian romance movie soundtrack. The overall sound reflects a vintage South Asian musical tradition with a warm and inviting mood.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This purely instrumental piece features a slow, steady rhythm driven by strings like the violin and cello, alongside piano to create a rich, melancholic texture. The resulting atmosphere is deeply somber and reflective, offering an immersive soundscape perfect for quiet contemplation.

questions.name: Sample 10
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece is a beautiful example of a solo piano composition featuring a slow tempo that allows listeners to appreciate intricate melodies and harmonies. The music adopts a minimalist approach with a gentle, flowing rhythm designed to create a contemplative and introspective mood. This calm and peaceful soundscape invites deep reflection on personal emotions without any vocal distraction.

The steady rhythm supports the folk-inspired sound, making it suitable for a cheerful campfire gathering or a countryside road trip. While related songs suggest a festive or reflective mood, this specific segment stands out as an energetic instrumental highlight from a parody cover band.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
